generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller used for sensor data acquisition and hardware control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PositionDataTransmitted, VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance TimescaleDBTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane state including position, velocity, swing angle, and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, PositionDataTransmitted, VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for system services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboard displays"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance GantrylibPythonModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance AutodeskFusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of crane dynamics for predicting behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibPythonModule
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for system architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinSystem
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical crane state data to TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides data visualization using Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachNotification
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for prediction and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory path with confidence bounds"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging status and integrity"
]

instance TrajectoryVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of trajectory traces with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance ThresholdBreachNotification : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operator notification for threshold breaches during validation"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for crane dynamics analysis"
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system inspired by Antwerp port cranes"
    base:contains CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance DigitalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system for lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., movement trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service) sent via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which controls the motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data logging and validation; trajectory generation and validation occur in near real-time during operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical crane interacts with Python-based control and logging applications, which communicate via MQTT broker to a TimescaleDB database and Grafana dashboard; services like trajectory generation and validation run on the same system."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; used for monitoring, control, and continuous validation during operational lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics and comparing against acceptable thresholds; model validation techniques reused from prior research to ensure fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol via Eclipse Mosquitto broker for communication between physical and virtual components; data logging to TimescaleDB via Python applications."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker Compose for containerized services (TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana); gantrylib Python module installed via pip for control and logging applications."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards followed; ad-hoc implementation using general open-source technologies (e.g., MQTT, PostgreSQL, Grafana) without adherence to formal digital twin standards."
]
